_how_to_use: Add objects to 'requests'. Each entry: date (YYYY-MM-DD, IST), topic, optional type (unsolved_mystery|true_story|mind_blowing_fact). The 6 AM job on that date uses YOUR topic instead of the auto SEO pick. For a custom thumbnail, drop <date>.png OR <slug>.png in the thumbnails/ folder.

requests.topic: Bharat ki Sabse Badi Bank Robbery
